title: Swamplesque
full_description: Australia's ultimate Shrek-inspired burlesque and drag parody — award-winning, critically acclaimed and five-star rated. (Note: not affiliated with Shrek The Movie or DreamWorks. This is parody.) An hour of unapologetic fun that celebrates body diversity at its core, with a wide range of body types and a cast of queer performers dismantling bodily shame one sequin at a time.
ai_summary: The hottest ticket at Fringe 2024 and 2025 — a queer, body-positive burlesque parody of Shrek that has absolutely no affiliation with DreamWorks but does have an extraordinary amount of sequins, sass, and skin. Winner of Best Cabaret, Melbourne Fringe.
